plugins.name: Abstract Loading
plugins.description: A mesmerizing abstract animation using WebGL shaders — flowing, iridescent forms inspired by visual music and liquid art.
plugins.author: justinmeimar
plugins.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="9" cy="10" r="6" fill="#7c3aed" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="15" cy="10" r="6" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="12" cy="15" r="6" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.6"/></svg>

plugins.name: Rustlings
plugins.tagline: Learn Rust, one exercise at a time
plugins.description: An incremental Rust learning game mapped to The Rust Programming Language book. Navigate a skill tree of concepts and solve coding exercises to progress.
plugins.author: justinmeimar
plugins.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg>

plugins.name: Coding Polyglot
plugins.description: Quick code reading challenges across programming languages. Predict what the code outputs to sharpen your understanding of language semantics.
plugins.author: justinmeimar
plugins.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M2 12h20"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
